body_txt: A visual gag where an extremely short character is introduced in a manner that makes them appear much taller than they actually are . Also the inverse, where someone ( or something ) of great size or height is made to appear normal-sized at first, or perhaps introduced in a shorter or chibi-like form. Sister trope to Profile View Gag . A subtrope is Big Shadow, Little Creature , where this is done via a large shadow cast on the wall. Depth Deception is the Super-Trope — all examples that don't involve people should go there. May involve the use of Hitler Cam . See also Mister Big . Contrast with "Down Here!" Shot .
